titleStmt.title: SII 5.433: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 433. (A.R. No. 142 of 1894). ON THE OUTSIDE OF THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra
vattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyade vaṟku yāṇṭu 4vatu kiḻvempan
āṭṭut tirunelveliyil cuttavallipperuṉteruvil vā(ā)
ṇiyaromThe word vāṇiyarom is written over an erasure.malaimaṇṭalattu malaiyām pirāmaṇaril me
lmaṉai nārāyaṇaṉ Uruttirappiḷḷai Ivvāṭṭai vaiykāci maāsattu 2 10This is entered below the line almost in continuation of the end of the next line.
tiyati cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Atta nāḷ kalliluñ ce
mpilum veṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu nāyaṉār tirunelveliu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil taṭāraccirammuṭaiyaRead taṭāriccarammuṭaiyanāyaṉā
ṟku nittanimantamāka Aṉavaratāṉaṉāle Uḻakkeṇṇai tiru
nuntāviḷakkukku nāyaṉāṟku Aḷakkum perumpaṭiyuṭaṉe Innāyaṉā
ṟkuc cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Iveṇṇai Uḻakkum Aḷappomāka
Ivvurittirappiḷḷai pakkale Emmilaicainta vilaipporuḷ Innāḷi
le kaiyyile kaiyyaṟak koṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavaṟ
celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom vāṇiyarom nā
rāyaṇaṉ Uruttirappiḷḷaikku . Ivai taṉapotarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik ki
vai nantivattarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai māpotiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭik kivai māṇikkavācakaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai ceramāntoḻaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭik kivai camaiyaceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai nakaraceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭik kivai vaikaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunelveliuṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu IppaṭikkiRead kuivai Uttamapālaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.433 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
